name: Tests for One Mean
purpose: Compare one mean to a known value (one-sample t / z test).

name: Two-Sample T-Tests Assuming Equal Variance (Enter Means)
purpose: Compare two independent means assuming equal variances.

name: Tests for Paired Means
purpose: Compare two paired means.

name: Tests for One Proportion
purpose: Compare a proportion to a known value.

name: Tests for Two Proportions
purpose: Compare two independent proportions.

name: Pearson's Correlation Tests
purpose: Test Pearson correlation coefficient against zero.

name: One-Way Analysis of Variance F-Tests
purpose: Compare k group means via one-way ANOVA F-test.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for Two Means using Differences
purpose: Test that the new treatment is not worse than the standard by more than a margin (difference scale).

name: Equivalence Tests for Two Means using Differences
purpose: Test that two treatments are within a margin of each other (TOST on the difference).

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Difference Between Two Proportions
purpose: Test that the new treatment's success rate is not worse than the reference by more than a margin.

name: Equivalence Tests for the Difference Between Two Proportions
purpose: Test that two proportions are within a margin of each other.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for Two Means using Differences
purpose: Test that one treatment is superior to another by at least a clinically meaningful margin.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for the Difference Between Two Proportions
purpose: Test that one treatment's success rate exceeds another by at least a clinically meaningful margin.

name: Cox Regression
purpose: Sample size for Cox proportional-hazards regression coefficient test (Hsieh & Lavori 2000).

name: Tests for Two Correlated Proportions (McNemar Test)
purpose: McNemar test for paired binary outcomes (pre/post or matched-pair design).

name: Chi-Square Tests
purpose: Chi-square test for r×c contingency tables (Cohen's w effect size).

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for One Mean
purpose: Test that the mean is not below a reference by more than a margin (one-sample NI).

name: Equivalence Tests for One Mean
purpose: TOST equivalence test for one mean against a reference value.

name: Logrank Tests (Freedman)
purpose: Sample size for two-group survival comparison via Freedman's method.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for One Proportion
purpose: Test that a proportion is not below a reference by more than a margin.

name: Equivalence Tests for One Proportion
purpose: TOST equivalence test for a proportion against a reference value.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for One Proportion
purpose: Test that a proportion exceeds a reference by at least a margin.

name: Tests for Two Means in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: Compare two means with cluster randomization (Donner & Klar).

name: Tests for Two Proportions in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: Compare two proportions with cluster randomization (Donner & Klar).

name: Tests for Two Means in a 2x2 Cross-Over Design using Differences
purpose: 2x2 cross-over comparison of two treatments (within-subject SD).

name: Group-Sequential Tests for Two Means
purpose: Group-sequential boundaries (O'Brien-Fleming / Pocock / Hwang-Shih-DeCani) for two-mean tests.

name: M-Period Cross-Over Designs using Contrasts
purpose: Higher-order (M-period) cross-over with arbitrary contrasts of treatment means.

name: Logrank Tests (Lachin and Foulkes)
purpose: Two-group survival sample size with accrual + follow-up (Lachin & Foulkes 1986).

name: One-Way Repeated Measures
purpose: Within-subject one-factor repeated measures ANOVA (Greenhouse-Geisser ε).

name: Equivalence Tests for Two Means in a 2x2 Cross-Over Design using Ratios
purpose: 2x2 cross-over bioequivalence on log-transformed ratios (FDA/EMA 80/125% standard).

name: Tests for One Variance
purpose: Test that the population variance equals a target value (chi-square).

name: Tests for Two Variances
purpose: Compare two independent variances (F-ratio test).

name: Tests for One Coefficient Alpha
purpose: Test that Cronbach's coefficient alpha equals a target value.

name: Tests for Two Coefficient Alphas
purpose: Compare two coefficient alphas (Feldt & Brennan).

name: Confidence Intervals for One Variance using Variance
purpose: Sample size for chi-square-based CI of one variance with desired width.

name: Confidence Intervals for One Variance using Relative Error
purpose: Sample size for variance CI with relative-error specification.

name: Confidence Intervals for One Variance with Tolerance Probability
purpose: Variance CI with assurance (tolerance) probability.

name: Confidence Intervals for the Ratio of Two Variances using Variances
purpose: F-based CI on the ratio of two variances.

name: Confidence Intervals for the Ratio of Two Variances using Relative Error
purpose: Ratio-of-variances CI with relative-error specification.

name: Confidence Intervals for One Standard Deviation using Standard Deviation
purpose: Sample size for SD CI specified on the SD scale.

name: Confidence Intervals for One Standard Deviation using Relative Error
purpose: SD CI with relative-error specification.

name: Confidence Intervals for One Standard Deviation with Tolerance Probability
purpose: SD CI with assurance probability.

name: Confidence Intervals for Coefficient Alpha
purpose: CI for Cronbach's coefficient alpha (Feldt 1965).

name: Levene Test of Variances (Simulation)
purpose: Levene homogeneity-of-variance test power via Monte Carlo simulation.

name: Bartlett Test of Variances (Simulation)
purpose: Bartlett homogeneity-of-variance test power via simulation.

name: Brown-Forsythe Test of Variances (Simulation)
purpose: Brown-Forsythe homogeneity-of-variance test power via simulation.

name: Conover Test of Variances (Simulation)
purpose: Conover rank-based test of variances via simulation.

name: Confidence Intervals for Cp
purpose: Sample size for Cp process-capability CI (chi-square inversion).

name: Confidence Intervals for Cpk
purpose: Sample size for Cpk process-capability CI.

name: Standard Deviation Estimator
purpose: Utility: pool SD estimates from prior studies (weighted by df).

name: Standard Deviation of Means Calculator
purpose: Utility: σ_m from a list of hypothesised means for ANOVA-style power.

name: Chi-Square Effect Size Estimator
purpose: Utility: Cohen's w from a contingency-table cell probability matrix.

name: Kappa Estimator
purpose: Utility: expected Cohen's kappa from marginal agreement probabilities.

name: Two-Sample T-Tests Allowing Unequal Variance (Enter Means)
purpose: Welch t-test (unequal variances) — input as group means.

name: Two-Sample T-Tests Allowing Unequal Variance (Enter Difference)
purpose: Welch t-test (unequal variances) — input as mean difference.

name: Two-Sample T-Tests Assuming Equal Variance (Enter Difference)
purpose: Two-sample t (equal var) — input as mean difference.

name: Two-Sample Z-Tests Assuming Equal Variance (Enter Means)
purpose: Two-sample z-test (known equal var) — input as group means.

name: Two-Sample Z-Tests Assuming Equal Variance (Enter Difference)
purpose: Two-sample z-test (known equal var) — input as mean difference.

name: Two-Sample Z-Tests Allowing Unequal Variance (Enter Means)
purpose: Two-sample z-test (unequal known var) — input as group means.

name: Two-Sample Z-Tests Allowing Unequal Variance (Enter Difference)
purpose: Two-sample z-test (unequal known var) — input as mean difference.

name: Conditional Power of One-Sample T-Tests
purpose: Conditional power at interim for a one-sample t-test.

name: Conditional Power of Paired T-Tests
purpose: Conditional power at interim for a paired t-test.

name: Conditional Power of Two-Sample T-Tests
purpose: Conditional power at interim for a two-sample t-test.

name: Multiple One-Sample or Paired T-Tests
purpose: Family of one-sample/paired t-tests with multiplicity adjustment.

name: Multiple Two-Sample T-Tests
purpose: Family of two-sample t-tests with multiplicity adjustment.

name: Hotelling's One-Sample T2
purpose: Multivariate Hotelling T² for one sample (multiple endpoints).

name: Hotelling's Two-Sample T2
purpose: Multivariate Hotelling T² for two groups (multiple endpoints).

name: Williams' Test for the Minimum Effective Dose
purpose: Williams' isotonic-regression test for the minimum effective dose.

name: Multiple Comparisons
purpose: Sample size for ANOVA followed by multiple comparison procedures.

name: Pair-Wise Multiple Comparisons (Simulation)
purpose: Pair-wise comparisons via simulation (Tukey/Bonferroni/Scheffe).

name: Multiple Contrasts (Simulation)
purpose: Multiple custom contrasts via simulation.

name: Multiple Comparisons of Treatments vs a Control (Simulation)
purpose: Dunnett-style treatments-vs-control comparisons via simulation.

name: One-Way Analysis of Variance Contrasts
purpose: One-way ANOVA with single contrast (linear combination of means).

name: One-Way Analysis of Variance F-Tests (Simulation)
purpose: One-way ANOVA F via simulation (robust to non-normality).

name: Power Comparison of Tests of Means in One-Way Designs (Simulation)
purpose: Compare power of F vs Kruskal-Wallis vs Welch in one-way design.

name: Tests for Two Groups of Pre-Post Scores
purpose: Pre-post change comparison between two groups (ANCOVA-style).

name: Tests for Two Means in a Multicenter Randomized Design
purpose: Two-arm comparison stratified by center (variance components).

name: Tests for Fold Change of Two Means
purpose: Two-sample fold-change (log-scale) test (genomics convention).

name: Tests for Two Means using Ratios
purpose: Two-sample geometric-mean ratio test (log-scale t).

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for Two Means using Ratios
purpose: Non-inferiority on the ratio scale (log-transformed).

name: Equivalence Tests for Two Means using Ratios
purpose: Equivalence (TOST) on the ratio scale (log-transformed).

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for Two Means using Ratios
purpose: Superiority by margin on the ratio scale (log-transformed).

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for Two Means in a 2x2 Cross-Over Design using Differences
purpose: NI in 2x2 cross-over on difference scale.

name: Equivalence Tests for Two Means in a 2x2 Cross-Over Design using Differences
purpose: Equivalence (TOST) in 2x2 cross-over on difference scale.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for Two Means in a 2x2 Cross-Over Design using Differences
purpose: Sup-by-margin in 2x2 cross-over on difference scale.

name: Tests for Two Means in a 2x2 Cross-Over Design using Ratios
purpose: Test for the ratio of treatments in 2x2 cross-over.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for Two Means in a 2x2 Cross-Over Design using Ratios
purpose: NI in 2x2 cross-over on ratio scale.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for Two Means in a 2x2 Cross-Over Design using Ratios
purpose: Sup-by-margin in 2x2 cross-over on ratio scale.

name: Tests for the Difference of Two Means in a Higher-Order Cross-Over Design
purpose: Higher-order cross-over test for the difference of two treatments.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Difference of Two Means in a Higher-Order Cross-Over Design
purpose: NI in higher-order cross-over on difference scale.

name: Equivalence Tests for the Difference of Two Means in a Higher-Order Cross-Over Design
purpose: Equivalence in higher-order cross-over on difference scale.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for the Difference of Two Means in a Higher-Order Cross-Over Design
purpose: Sup-by-margin in higher-order cross-over on difference scale.

name: Confidence Intervals for One Proportion
purpose: Sample size for one-proportion CI.

name: Confidence Intervals for One Proportion from a Finite Population
purpose: One-proportion CI with finite population correction.

name: Confidence Intervals for the Difference Between Two Proportions
purpose: CI on the difference between two proportions.

name: Confidence Intervals for the Ratio of Two Proportions
purpose: CI on the ratio of two proportions.

name: Confidence Intervals for the Odds Ratio of Two Proportions
purpose: CI on the odds ratio of two proportions.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Ratio of Two Proportions
purpose: Non-inferiority on the ratio (relative risk) scale.

name: Equivalence Tests for the Ratio of Two Proportions
purpose: Equivalence (TOST) on the ratio scale of proportions.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for the Ratio of Two Proportions
purpose: Superiority by margin on the ratio scale.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Odds Ratio of Two Proportions
purpose: Non-inferiority on the odds-ratio scale.

name: Equivalence Tests for the Odds Ratio of Two Proportions
purpose: Equivalence on the odds-ratio scale.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for the Odds Ratio of Two Proportions
purpose: Superiority by margin on the odds-ratio scale.

name: Tests for Two Proportions in a Stratified Design (Cochran-Mantel-Haenszel Test)
purpose: Cochran-Mantel-Haenszel test in stratified 2x2 tables.

name: Tests for Two Proportions in a Repeated Measures Design
purpose: Two-proportion comparison in a repeated-measures design.

name: Tests for Two Correlated Proportions in a Matched Case-Control Design
purpose: Matched case-control McNemar variant.

name: Tests for Two Ordered Categorical Variables
purpose: Wilcoxon-Mann-Whitney for two ordered categorical variables.

name: Cochran-Armitage Test for Trend in Proportions
purpose: Linear-trend test for proportions across ordered groups.

name: Confidence Interval for Pearson's Correlation
purpose: Sample size for Pearson correlation CI (Fisher z).

name: Confidence Intervals for Spearman's Rank Correlation
purpose: Sample size for Spearman rho CI.

name: Confidence Intervals for Kendall's Tau-b Correlation
purpose: Sample size for Kendall's tau-b CI.

name: Confidence Intervals for Intraclass Correlation
purpose: Sample size for ICC confidence interval.

name: Confidence Intervals for Point Biserial Correlation
purpose: Sample size for point-biserial correlation CI.

name: Tests for Two Correlations
purpose: Compare two independent correlation coefficients (Fisher z).

name: Lin's Concordance Correlation Coefficient
purpose: Lin's concordance correlation coefficient (CCC) for agreement studies.

name: Tests for Intraclass Correlation
purpose: Test ICC against a null value (Shrout-Fleiss).

name: Point Biserial Correlation Tests
purpose: Test point-biserial correlation against zero.

name: Spearman's Rank Correlation Tests (Simulation)
purpose: Power for Spearman rank correlation test via simulation.

name: Kendall's Tau-b Correlation Tests (Simulation)
purpose: Power for Kendall's tau-b test via simulation.

name: Pearson's Correlation Tests (Simulation)
purpose: Power for Pearson correlation test via simulation.

name: Power Comparison of Correlation Tests (Simulation)
purpose: Compare power of Pearson vs Spearman vs Kendall correlation tests.

name: Confidence Intervals for Linear Regression Slope
purpose: Sample size for linear regression slope CI.

name: Confidence Intervals for Michaelis-Menten Parameters
purpose: CI for Michaelis-Menten Vmax/Km nonlinear regression.

name: Confidence Intervals for Kappa
purpose: Sample size for Cohen's kappa CI.

name: Confidence Intervals for One-Way Repeated Measures Contrasts
purpose: CI for contrasts in one-way repeated-measures design.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for Two Survival Curves Using Cox PH
purpose: Non-inferiority test for hazard ratio using Cox PH (Schoenfeld).

name: Equivalence Tests for Two Survival Curves Using Cox PH
purpose: Equivalence test (TOST) for hazard ratio using Cox PH.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for Two Survival Curves Using Cox PH
purpose: Superiority-by-margin test for hazard ratio using Cox PH (Schoenfeld).

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Difference of Two Hazard Rates
purpose: Non-inferiority test for difference of two exponential hazard rates (Lachin-Foulkes).

name: Equivalence Tests for the Difference of Two Hazard Rates
purpose: Equivalence test (TOST) for difference of two exponential hazard rates.

name: Group-Sequential Logrank Tests
purpose: Group-sequential logrank test with OBF or Pocock alpha spending.

name: One-Sample Cure Model Tests
purpose: One-sample cure model logrank test (Wu 2015, Weibull mixture).

name: Logrank Tests Accounting for Competing Risks
purpose: Logrank test accounting for competing risks (Pintilie 2002/2006).

name: Two-Way Analysis of Variance
purpose: Two-way fixed-effects ANOVA F-test for main effects A, B, or interaction AB.

name: Repeated Measures Analysis - Within-Subject
purpose: Within-subject F-test for repeated measures with Greenhouse-Geisser epsilon correction.

name: Repeated Measures Analysis - Mixed Between/Within
purpose: Split-plot mixed ANOVA: between-group or within-subject F-test with compound symmetry.

name: Multivariate Analysis of Variance (MANOVA) - Pillai
purpose: MANOVA power via Pillai trace F approximation across multiple response variables.

name: One-Way Analysis of Covariance (ANCOVA)
purpose: One-way ANCOVA: covariate R² reduces residual variance, improving power over plain ANOVA.

name: Multiple Regression - Omnibus F Test
purpose: Omnibus F-test for incremental R² (delta-R²) in multiple regression; tests q predictors after controlling for others.

name: Multiple Regression - Partial Correlation t Test
purpose: t-test (F, df1=1) for a single partial correlation in multiple regression.

name: Multiple Regression - Multivariate Wilks Lambda
purpose: Rao's F approximation to Wilks' Lambda for multivariate regression with p response variables.

name: Tests for One Poisson Rate
purpose: Test whether a Poisson rate λ equals a specified value λ0 (exact Poisson enumeration).

name: Tests for the Ratio of Two Poisson Rates
purpose: Test the ratio RR=λ2/λ1 of two Poisson event rates using the W5 variance-stabilised statistic (Gu 2008). Equal N allocation.

name: Tests for the Ratio of Two Negative Binomial Rates
purpose: Wald/LR test for the ratio RR=λ2/λ1 of two negative binomial event rates with over-dispersion parameter κ (Zhu & Lakkis 2014).

name: Tests for the Ratio of Two Poisson Rates (Variable Follow-Up)
purpose: Person-time incidence rate ratio test with explicit (possibly unequal) follow-up times t1/t2 per arm using W5 variance-stabilised statistic.

name: Tests for One ROC Curve
purpose: Power/N for a one-sample AUC test comparing observed ROC area against a null hypothesis value.

name: Tests for Two ROC Curves (Independent)
purpose: Power/N to compare two ROC AUC values from independent diagnostic studies (r=0 variant).

name: Tests for Two ROC Curves (Correlated)
purpose: Power/N to compare two correlated ROC AUC values from the same subjects evaluated by two diagnostic tests (, Obuchowski-McClish).

name: Tests for One-Sample Sensitivity and Specificity
purpose: Power/N for a one-sample exact binomial test of sensitivity (or specificity) against a null hypothesis value given prevalence.

name: Tests for Two Independent Sensitivities
purpose: Power/N to compare sensitivity (or specificity) between two groups; supports independent Z-test and paired McNemar test.

name: Kappa Test for Agreement Between Two Raters
purpose: Power/N for a Z-test of kappa (Cohen's) against a null hypothesis kappa value, for nominal or binary ratings by two raters (, Flack 1988).

name: Mann-Whitney-Wilcoxon Tests (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo simulation power for the Mann-Whitney-Wilcoxon (Wilcoxon rank-sum) test under user-specified group distributions.

name: Kruskal-Wallis Tests (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo simulation power for the Kruskal-Wallis H-test under user-specified group distributions.

name: Two-Stage Phase II Clinical Trials
purpose: Simon (1989) two-stage Phase II design; search for optimal (min EN) or minimax (min N) design meeting exact binomial alpha and power constraints.

name: Two-Stage Phase II Clinical Trials (Simon Optimal)
purpose: Simon (1989) optimal two-stage Phase II design minimising expected sample size E(N) under H0.

name: Two-Stage Phase II Clinical Trials (Simon Minimax)
purpose: Simon (1989) minimax two-stage Phase II design minimising maximum total sample size N.

name: Single-Stage Phase II Clinical Trials
purpose: Exact binomial single-stage Phase II design (A'Hern 2001/Fleming 1982); finds minimum N and rejection boundary satisfying alpha and power constraints.

name: Three-Stage Phase II Clinical Trials
purpose: Chen (1997) three-stage Phase II design with two interim futility looks; exhaustive search for optimal (min EN) or minimax (min N3) design.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for Two Means in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: Non-inferiority test for two means with cluster randomization (Campbell & Walters / Ahn-Heo-Zhang).

name: Equivalence Tests for Two Means in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: TOST equivalence test for two means with cluster randomization (Schuirmann TOST with cluster design effect).

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for Two Means in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: Superiority-by-margin test for two means with cluster randomization.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Difference of Two Proportions in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: Non-inferiority test for two proportions (difference scale) with cluster randomization (Farrington-Manning score test).

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Ratio of Two Proportions in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: Non-inferiority test for two proportions (ratio scale) with cluster randomization (Farrington-Manning score test).

name: Equivalence Tests for the Difference of Two Proportions in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: TOST equivalence test for two proportions (difference scale) with cluster randomization (Farrington-Manning score test).

name: Tests for the Difference Between Two Poisson Rates in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: Two-arm cluster-randomized Poisson rate comparison (Hayes & Bennett 1999).

name: Logrank Tests in a Cluster-Randomized Design
purpose: Logrank test power/sample-size with intracluster correlation (Xie & Waksman 2003 / Freedman 1982).

name: Group-Sequential Tests for Two Proportions
purpose: Group-sequential design for two-proportion superiority tests (OBF + Pocock + Lan-DeMets spending).

name: Group-Sequential Tests for Two Means (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential power for two means (simulation-based).

name: Group-Sequential Tests for Two Proportions (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential power for two proportions (simulation-based).

name: Group-Sequential Logrank Tests (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential logrank power (simulation-based).

name: Group-Sequential Non-Inferiority Tests for Two Means (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential NI power for two means (simulation-based).

name: Group-Sequential Non-Inferiority Tests for the Difference of Two Proportions (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential NI power for two proportions difference (simulation-based).
synonyms: group sequential NI proportions difference simulation

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Ratio of Two Means in a Higher-Order Cross-Over Design
purpose: NI test for ratio of two means in a higher-order cross-over design (multiplicative model).

name: Equivalence Tests for the Ratio of Two Means in a Higher-Order Cross-Over Design
purpose: TOST equivalence test for ratio of two means in a higher-order cross-over design (multiplicative model).

name: Conditional Power of One Proportion Tests
purpose: Conditional power at interim for a one-proportion z-test.

name: Conditional Power of Two Proportions Tests
purpose: Conditional power at interim for a two-proportion z-test.

name: Conditional Power of Logrank Tests
purpose: Conditional power at interim for a logrank test (survival analysis).

name: Tests for Two Means in a Repeated Measures Design
purpose: Power and sample size for the time-averaged difference between two means in a repeated measures design (TAD, GEE/mixed models).
synonyms: mixed model two arm longitudinal means

name: Tests for Two Proportions in a Repeated Measures Design
purpose: Power and sample size for the time-averaged difference between two proportions in a repeated measures design (logit-scale TAD).
synonyms: mixed model two arm longitudinal binary

name: Logistic Regression
purpose: Power and sample size for testing the slope in simple logistic regression (Hsieh 1989/1998 approximation). Supports normal and binary covariates.

name: Linear Regression
purpose: Power and sample size for testing that the slope in simple linear regression differs from a null value using a noncentral-F approach.

name: Conditional Power of 2x2 Cross-Over Designs
purpose: Conditional and predictive power at an interim look in a 2x2 cross-over design using the Jennison-Turnbull information-based formula.

name: MxM Cross-Over Designs
purpose: Power and sample size for an MxM balanced Latin-square cross-over design using the Geisser-Greenhouse corrected F-test under compound symmetry.

name: Control Charts for Means (Simulation)
purpose: Monte Carlo simulation of Average Run Length (ARL) and power for a Shewhart Xbar control chart under a shift in process mean.

name: Control Charts for Variability (Simulation)
purpose: Monte Carlo simulation of ARL and power for Shewhart R or S control charts under a shift in process standard deviation.

name: Acceptance Sampling for Attributes
purpose: Sample size and acceptance number for single-sampling lot acceptance plans based on AQL/LQL operating characteristic constraints using binomial (infinite lot) or hypergeometric (finite lot) distributions.

name: Confidence Intervals for One Mean
purpose: Sample size for a CI on one mean (known or unknown sigma).

name: Confidence Intervals for Paired Means
purpose: Sample size for a CI on the paired-difference mean.

name: Confidence Intervals for the Difference Between Two Means
purpose: Sample size for a CI on the difference of two independent means (Welch or pooled).

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Difference Between Two Correlated Proportions
purpose: Sample size/power for NI test of difference between two paired (McNemar) proportions.

name: Equivalence Tests for the Difference Between Two Correlated Proportions
purpose: Sample size/power for TOST equivalence test of difference between two paired proportions.

name: Non-Inferiority Tests for the Ratio of Two Correlated Proportions
purpose: Sample size/power for NI test of ratio of two paired proportions (Nam & Blackwelder 2002).

name: Non-Inferiority Logrank Tests
purpose: Sample size/power for two-sample NI logrank test (Jung et al. 2005 / Lakatos Markov model).

name: One-Sample Logrank Tests
purpose: Sample size/power for one-sample logrank test vs historical control (Wu 2015, Weibull).

name: Tests for One Exponential Mean
purpose: Sample size/power for one-sample exponential mean test using chi-square pivot (Epstein 1960).

name: Tests for Two Exponential Means
purpose: Sample size/power for two-sample exponential mean ratio test using F distribution.

name: Tests for One Mean (Simulation)
purpose: Monte Carlo power for one-sample t-test under arbitrary distributions.

name: Tests for Two Means (Simulation)
purpose: Monte Carlo power for two-sample t-test under arbitrary distributions.

name: Tests for Paired Means (Simulation)
purpose: Monte Carlo power for paired t-test under arbitrary distributions.

name: Equivalence Tests for Two Means (Simulation)
purpose: Monte Carlo power for two-sample TOST equivalence under arbitrary distributions.

name: Equivalence Tests for Paired Means (Simulation)
purpose: Monte Carlo power for paired TOST equivalence under arbitrary distributions.

name: Superiority by a Margin Tests for One Mean
purpose: Sample size/power for one-sample superiority-by-margin t-test.

name: Tests for the Ratio of Two Means in a Higher-Order Cross-Over Design
purpose: Power/sample size for inequality test of mean ratio in higher-order cross-over designs.

name: Confidence Intervals for the Area Under an ROC Curve
purpose: Sample size for a CI on AUC using Hanley-McNeil (1982) variance formula.

name: Tests for the Difference Between Two Linear Regression Slopes
purpose: Test H0: β1=β2 across two regression lines (Dupont & Plummer 1998).

name: Tests for the Difference Between Two Linear Regression Intercepts
purpose: Test H0: α1=α2 across two regression lines (Dupont & Plummer 1998).

name: Poisson Regression
purpose: Power for testing one Poisson regression coefficient (Signorini 1991).

name: Probit Analysis
purpose: Power for comparative LD50 study using probit regression (Kodell et al. 2010).

name: Post-Marketing Surveillance
purpose: PMS sample size for detecting rare adverse events (Machin et al. 1997).

name: Mendelian Randomization with a Continuous Outcome
purpose: MR power with continuous outcome using 2SLS and genetic instrument (Brion et al. 2013).

name: Confidence Intervals for One Mean with Tolerance Probability
purpose: Sample size for a CI on one mean with tolerance probability adjustment for SD uncertainty.

name: Confidence Intervals for Paired Means with Tolerance Probability
purpose: Sample size for a CI on paired-difference mean with tolerance probability adjustment.

name: Confidence Intervals for the Difference Between Two Means with Tolerance Probability
purpose: Sample size for a CI on the difference of two means with tolerance probability (pooled SD, equal groups;).
synonyms: CI difference two means tolerance probability

name: Confidence Intervals for the Exponential Lifetime Mean
purpose: Number of events for a CI on the exponential mean lifetime theta (chi-square pivot;).

name: Confidence Intervals for the Exponential Hazard Rate
purpose: Number of events for a CI on the exponential hazard rate lambda (chi-square pivot;).

name: Confidence Intervals for Exponential Reliability
purpose: Number of events for a CI on exponential survival probability R(t) = exp(-t/theta).

name: Confidence Intervals for an Exponential Lifetime Percentile
purpose: Number of events for a CI on the p-th percentile of the exponential distribution.

name: Group-Sequential Non-Inferiority Tests for the Ratio of Two Proportions (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential NI power for ratio of two proportions.
synonyms: group sequential NI proportions ratio simulation

name: Group-Sequential Non-Inferiority Tests for the Odds Ratio of Two Proportions (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential NI power for odds ratio of two proportions.
synonyms: group sequential NI proportions OR simulation

name: Group-Sequential Superiority by a Margin Tests for the Difference of Two Proportions (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential superiority-by-margin power for difference of two proportions.
synonyms: group sequential SUP proportions difference simulation

name: Group-Sequential Superiority by a Margin Tests for the Ratio of Two Proportions (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential superiority-by-margin power for ratio of two proportions.
synonyms: group sequential SUP proportions ratio simulation

name: Group-Sequential Superiority by a Margin Tests for the Odds Ratio of Two Proportions (Simulation)
purpose: Monte-Carlo group-sequential superiority-by-margin power for odds ratio of two proportions.
synonyms: group sequential SUP proportions OR simulation
